title: Public dashboard rollout (25-task plan)
description: Implement docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-27-public-dashboard.md — Phase 1 (data normalization) through Phase 5 (Makefile + README). Stop before flyctl deploy for user approval.
close_reason: All 25 plan tasks delivered locally; fly deploy pending user run.

title: Add correlation matrix page to dashboard
description: Compute pairwise Spearman rank correlations across all numeric metadata fields (category scores, total score, tokens, runtime) and render as a heatmap on a new dashboard page. Done at build time from leaderboard.json.
close_reason: Spearman correlation matrix added: build_dashboard.py emits dashboard/src/data/correlations.json; new /correlations/ Astro page renders heatmap; Header nav linked; 5 new tests covering monotonic/anti-monotonic/sparse/constant cases. Verified via npm build + preview.

title: Write LinkedIn article based on why_simulation_bench.md
description: Long-form LinkedIn article expanding on the design rationale and early observations documented in docs/why_simulation_bench.md. Target 800-1500 words.
close_reason: LinkedIn article drafted at posts/articles/linkedin/every-ai-agent-passes-the-automated-checks.md, AI writing checker score 0

title: Brainstorm + design public Simulation Bench dashboard
description: Public dashboard on fly.io: leaderboard, methodology page, submission code/outputs browser, normalized token+time capture, meta-score formula. Run brainstorming skill, write design doc, then writing-plans.

title: Save reviewer forms + create scores DB for submissions
description: Persist the 4 human-style reviewer forms into each submission's results/ folder as reviewer_form.md, then create a SQLite scores database with schema for submissions and per-category scores, plus a harness/record_score.py ingestion script and a scoreboard query script. Populate the DB with the 4 scores produced this session.
close_reason: Reviewer forms saved to each submission's results/reviewer_form.md; SQLite scores DB created at scores/scores.db with schema in harness/scores_db.py, ingestion via harness/record_score.py, and harness/scoreboard.py for querying. Source of truth in scores/seed_scores.json (4 rows seeded).

title: Independent human-style scoring of all 4 submissions
description: Spawn 4 opus subagents to score each submission against the 100-point rubric in SCORING_GUIDE.md, simulating human reviewers. Output completed reviewer forms with category scores, justifications, strengths, gaps, and final recommendations.

title: Evaluate all 4 submissions in /submissions
description: Run evaluate-submission skill against each submission folder using parallel opus subagents. Submissions: claude-code/opus-4-7, codex-cli/gpt-5-5, pi-agent/gemini, gsd2/gemini.
close_reason: All 4 submissions evaluated by parallel opus subagents; reports written to each submission's results/evaluation_report.json
